items.title:
[负面] 总体 3/10  大部分写于弥利亚姆首次UP，搬运来这里
本来以为能在电脑上玩大号，steam居然是...
items.summary:
总体 3/10  大部分写于弥利亚姆首次UP，搬运来这里
本来以为能在电脑上玩大号，steam居然是单独服务器，算了吧！
————
玩法 6/10
杀戮尖塔like很难做的不好玩，不同队伍也有自己的特点，但是组队灵活度很低（界域系统），平衡非常差劲，走格子的手感拉中拉，运营也没多少好玩的地方，基本是固定流程，一整关15-30分钟不等，在手游里不算太讨喜的时长
PvP不玩，所以不评价
借助战如果没有互关不能借到超出自己等级的角色，主线也不像其他游戏可以借碾压战力，而且借完助战想调队的话操作非常繁琐
角色间强度差距非常大，如果不幸厨到了弱角色就只能被社区骑脸了；厨到强角色的也不用担心，搞不好哪天策划脑子一抽就削弱了，上个这么爱削的好像还是BL3初期的jjc枪，得亏是没上日服不能定优良误认啊
————
剧情 3/10
克苏鲁（特指COJ）版fgo，简而言之是【基于正常的克苏鲁神话百科进行考据之后搞的COJ同人的N创的OC 青春版】
说原创吧也没那么原创，不原创吧还是挺OC人的，说是青春版是因为我觉得大部分OC人不会用这种剧情糟践自己的OC
但，都在“克系”玩ML了还能追求什么剧情呢是吧
角色身上的coj味道都太浓了，甚至跑团多的都能直接指认出来某些角色某些剧情和某些HO/猫的相似度，这每一章的剧本放DICEHO又是一个不亚于蛙祭+立花+雪箱的玩意儿，不说脓堕是因为它还没到那个逆天程度（但是运营有，很神奇吧，克在运营）
剧情大部分虎头蛇尾或者直接烂尾，推进得好像在跑coj，而在弥利亚姆剧情之后整个深海的剧情搞笑程度已经超过美工的用心程度了，也不知道编剧到底想不想卖角色（包括在剧情中联动的其他可抽取角色），到底有没有世界观规划
音乐中规中矩，个人无感但也不讨厌
配音也不算好，有几位的咬字听起来嘴里像含了话梅，声线也很容易拐偏，而且语气和文意完全不搭调
————
UI
逆天点击走格子手感，逆天界面，易用性非常差（比如周本深渊躲在小角落里）
语言调整到英文的时候还会有文字超出文本框的情况，字号大小不一，小小一行字配上更小的字号，非常费眼睛
————
运营 -10/10 脓堕一样的运营就算不玩也值得走过路过吃口瓜
送的多？金率高？没用，在这游戏之前属实没太见过手游在Up期间削卡的，也没见过因为在线时长不够就把扫荡功能删了的
抽卡方面16叠角色+16叠武器的上限属实有点开眼，平心而论不刚需抽满，但3个重复起步的还是大有人在，商店确实有可以免费升级的道具，但是一个月一个还不能保留，等原角色攒够了也该出新的了
此外还有很好笑的循环，不打过主线去升级角色需要打周本，打周本需要先打过主线，虽然有通用合成道具但是限制获取，所以那怎么办呢.gif

items.title: [正面] I had a review long ago where I feel i went in dep...
items.summary:
I had a review long ago where I feel i went in depth about mechanics and such in the game but it was def outdated and I must remark some new points.

First of all, THE TRANSLATION.
If you tried the game before or you heard about it you prolly know the fact the english translation was MTL and tbh, iffy AF. Random capitalization, the name of things changing, spa ces in ra ndom w ords and it overall was understandable arround 60% of the time. 
A recent update completely revamped the translation and the game's translation from what I've seen is now GOOD there's nothing "Decent" or "Enough" about it. The TL now is fully in the GOOD category.

The story/lore.
It is lovecraft, that's it, animefied and toned down but lovecraft nonetheless, I have left the story in the background from my part tbqh (Tho I'll resume it now with the translation improvements) but my friend who's a lovecraft fanboy loves it so that's that. But to give atleast some points from my side I will say unlike most gachas where the first 4 to 7 chapters are TRASH and then "It gets good later" this one is good from chapter 1.

Gameplay.
As everyone says, if you know card turn based RPGs like the ever popular Slay the Spire you know the gameplay, but imma get a bit into it deeper.

The gameplay got a small yet massive change in 2.0 related to realms, that I'll explain after I explain the realms themselves.

Chars are split into 4 "Realms".
Chaos.-The "main"/"Normal" realm who's main gimmick was being usable alongside any other realm, with 2.0 it kinda lost this gimmick (But not really) The main gimmick of chaos is adaptability and recharge of MC skills/silver key energy.

Caro.- The gimmicks here are Embryo fusion and Crimson Furnace, Caro chars can create "Embryos" special 0 cost cards that recharge ult and give crit rate or they can use them when casting ults to gain extra effects, crimson furnace stores "Extra HP" which you can use up at any time to heal or use them on skills.

Aequor.- Tentacles, That's really it, Aequor chars have tentacles which attack through skills of some chars, ults, some in map buffs and end of turn. The tentacles have 3 states which you can change only once per turn.
Normal.- Pretty default, what you see is what you get.
Defense.- Lose half of the total damage, gain a shield of 10% of max HP and each tentacle hit also gives some shielding.
Rage.-Gain some attack, some crit rate and at the start of the next turn lose one of your tentacles.

Ultra.- Funni time stop, ultra gimmick relies on the "Ultra space", each time you use a card for the first time it counts as a "Leap" and stores the card in the "ultra space" whilst triggering any "Leap" effect the card has, after the ultra space is full you gain an "Ultra turn" where your hand is filled with the stored cards and you get an extra turn without allowing the enemy to do anything.

Before 2.0 you could only run "Pure" teams nowadays you can use any 2 realms together. Adding Chaos to any other realm or running only units of that realm counts as a "Pure" realm which has some stronger mechanics like ultra which cripples any non pure ultra cards in ultra turn.

THE EVER DREADED GACHA.
It's aight.
It is perhaps the most F2P friendly gacha I've seen alongside limbab and trust me, I've seen some ♥♥♥♥. 
The rates are 5% of an SSR with a pity of 30 a banner rate of 33% per SSR and a banner pity of 3 SSRs so at max unluck you get a char at 90 pulls if you somehow whiff all 5% and 33% rates.
Gacha currency is given out in droves, selectors are common-ish in big events and so are "Resets" that allow you to reset any char you have to 0 and get selectors equal to that char + his dupes. If as a F2P you go for mostly only chars you should have no problem getting anyone you like, I started with the steam release and got all the chars I spent exactly once 15 bucks purely cuz, yeah. This game deserves money, It really deserves more but I am stingy AF so I already did my part kekw.

items.title: [正面] Played it 4 hours straight and only stopped cause ...
items.summary:
Played it 4 hours straight and only stopped cause I got tired. Gonna try and make this one of my go-to games on my PC. Would recommend, since it's you know, free. You do get a free 5 star when you play and unlock it, and you can choose. The rates are gacha rates. Horrifying. But so far I haven't come across anything that required me to use money. Might update this review as I go along.

So far the story is a 10/10 though. If nothing else, I recommend playing for the story. Or just watch it on youtube or something at least :D
